splits.title: General Church Offices Frontispiece
splits.end_boundary: They sleep! And peaceful is their rest,

splits.title: The Records of Our Dead
splits.author: Lula Greene Richards
splits.start_boundary: THE RECORDS OF OUR DEAD. By Lula Greene Richards.
splits.end_boundary: And still in other books record The saving covenant anew.

splits.title: Remarks Made at the Relief Society General Conference
splits.author: President Heber J. Grant
splits.start_boundary: Remarks Made at the Relief Society General Conference. June 3, 1919
splits.end_boundary: I see, my sisters, that the time has passed. God bless you. Amen.

running_headers_to_strip: REMARKS BY PRESIDENT HEBER J. GRANT
files.notes: This file contains the frontispiece image reference, a poem about genealogy/records of the dead, and President Grant's conference address. The frontispiece section appears to be incomplete or corrupted, starting mid-sentence with content from President Grant's talk.
